TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: gaga psani' skura yow na nni'an (1)iyik na nbuw uwow ga tmring uwow tluling ro rpusun gleng uwow, skura lutux bnkisan ro msina howey na lutux . (2)ini kani' hoyin, patung ro tla'ung, kani' laga kba' mga'in. (3)mrkyas ro la'iy ga ini kani' tunux sinuw, ro biyux sinuw, ro kakey na sinuw uy. (4)suley ro pipi na sinuw, la'iy ga ini hmtiy mani' mani' laga hlow mrpyut insuna, kwara kwe ga nanak bnkis ga thoyey mani'. (5)uwah mtisan Sali lpyung ga ini kani' bih tanux Sali' kya, kwara nni'an ga spni'an na lpyung, ro bkis lama mani', la'iy ga puting mani'. Bnrwan qa galan cpung śõłÁõģšĺÜśļź:śĪüśėéśłÖYawi‚ÄßNomin, .
S.PHON: …£a…£a ps~…ēani Ē s~…ēkura jow na nni Ēan (*)ijik na nő≤uw uwow …£a tmriŇč uwow tluliŇč ro rpus~…ēun …£leŇč uwow, s~…ēkura lutux ő≤nkis~…ēan ro ms~…ēina ńßowej na lutux . (*)ini kani Ē ńßojin, patuŇč ro tla ĒuŇč, kani Ē la…£a kő≤a Ē m…£a Ēin. (*)mrkjas~…ē ro la Ēij …£a ini kani Ē tunux s~…ēinuw, ro ő≤ijux s~…ēinuw, ro kakej na s~…ēinuw uj. (*)s~…ēulej ro pipi na s~…ēinuw, la Ēij …£a ini ńßmtij mani Ē mani Ē la…£a ńßlow mrpjut ins~…ēuna, kwara kwe …£a nanak ő≤nkis~…ē …£a tńßojej mani Ē. (*)uwańß mtis~…ēan s~…ēali lpjuŇč …£a ini kani Ē ő≤ińß tanux s~…ēali Ē kja, kwara nni Ēan …£a s~…ēpni Ēan na lpjuŇč, ro ő≤kis~…ē lama mani Ē, la Ēij …£a putiŇč mani Ē. ő≤nrwan qa …£alan ¶~ ®puŇč ****:***jawi*nomin, .
S.FORM: gaga psani' skura yow na nni'an (1)iyik na nbuw uwow ga tmring uwow tluling ro rpusun gleng uwow, skura lutux bnkisan ro msina howey na lutux . (2)ini kani' hoyin, patung ro tla'ung, kani' laga kba' mga'in. (3)mrkyas ro la'iy ga ini kani' tunux sinuw, ro biyux sinuw, ro kakey na sinuw uy. (4)suley ro pipi na sinuw, la'iy ga ini hmtiy mani' mani' laga hlow mrpyut insuna, kwara kwe ga nanak bnkis ga thoyey mani'. (5)uwah mtisan Sali lpyung ga ini kani' bih tanux Sali' kya, kwara nni'an ga spni'an na lpyung, ro bkis lama mani', la'iy ga puting mani'. Bnrwan qa galan cpung śõłÁõģšĺÜśļź:śĪüśėéśłÖYawi‚ÄßNomin, .
S.PHON: …£a…£a ps~…ēani Ē s~…ēkura jow na nni Ēan (*)ijik na nő≤uw uwow …£a tmriŇč uwow tluliŇč ro rpus~…ēun …£leŇč uwow, s~…ēkura lutux ő≤nkis~…ēan ro ms~…ēina ńßowej na lutux . (*)ini kani Ē ńßojin, patuŇč ro tla ĒuŇč, kani Ē la…£a kő≤a Ē m…£a Ēin. (*)mrkjas~…ē ro la Ēij …£a ini kani Ē tunux s~…ēinuw, ro ő≤ijux s~…ēinuw, ro kakej na s~…ēinuw uj. (*)s~…ēulej ro pipi na s~…ēinuw, la Ēij …£a ini ńßmtij mani Ē mani Ē la…£a ńßlow mrpjut ins~…ēuna, kwara kwe …£a nanak ő≤nkis~…ē …£a tńßojej mani Ē. (*)uwańß mtis~…ēan s~…ēali lpjuŇč …£a ini kani Ē ő≤ińß tanux s~…ēali Ē kja, kwara nni Ēan …£a s~…ēpni Ēan na lpjuŇč, ro ő≤kis~…ē lama mani Ē, la Ēij …£a putiŇč mani Ē. ő≤nrwan qa …£alan ¶~ ®puŇč ****:***jawi*nomin, .
